**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Tianyou Energy Industry Co. exhibits extreme 'Scope Inflation' typical of a generalized trading shell or a dormant invoice/capital-routing entity. Although officially classified as a manufacturer of 'non-electric household appliances', it reports 0 insured employees in 2024 and is registered in a commercial office room (Room 903, Himalaya Commercial Center). This physically impossible combination is further exacerbated by its business scope, which lists an absurdly broad range of activities—from solar power installation and coal wholesale to selling jewelry, clothing, cosmetics, and agricultural bonsai. This omni-category approach, coupled with a sole proprietorship structure and reliance on personal QQ emails, strongly indicates it is an asset-light vehicle utilized by its owner for diverse trade brokerage, centralized procurement, or dormant holding purposes, completely devoid of any real manufacturing capabilities.
